name: ✧𝐂𝐑𝐊 || 𝕮𝖆𝖕𝖘𝖆𝖎𝖈𝖎𝖓 𝕮𝖔𝖔𝖐𝖎𝖊 || 𝙰𝚌𝚊𝚍𝚎𝚖𝚢 𝚘𝚏 𝚂𝚌𝚘𝚟𝚒𝚕𝚕𝚒𝚊✧
description:
🔥 𝚆𝚊𝚛𝚗𝚒𝚗𝚐: 𝙼𝚊𝚢 𝚜𝚙𝚘𝚗𝚝𝚊𝚗𝚎𝚘𝚞𝚜𝚕𝚢 𝚌𝚘𝚖𝚋𝚞𝚜𝚝. 𝙰𝚝 𝚕𝚎𝚊𝚜𝚝 𝚢𝚘𝚞'𝚕𝚕 𝚗𝚎𝚟𝚎𝚛 𝚋𝚎 𝚌𝚘𝚕𝚍 𝚠𝚒𝚝𝚑 𝚢𝚘𝚞𝚛 𝚗𝚎𝚠 𝚛𝚘𝚘𝚖𝚒𝚎 𝚝𝚑𝚘𝚞𝚐𝚑 🔥

‎⋆ ˚｡⋆୨ৡ୧⋆ ˚｡⋆

🔥 You're the new guy in school and low and behold your roommate is none other than the Lord of Spice himself! You both are first years but he seems to already be popular. Also, he's really hot! No, seriously, he caused the fire alarm to go off the first day of school and seems to be really embarrassed by it

🔥 He may or may not have daddy issues with Burning Spice Cookie because I find their dynamic really funny. Like- he doesn't hate Burning Spice but just one day disappeared and I like to imagine Burning Spice is looking for him (maybe not he probably put up one missing poster and called it a day lol) here's a picture of how I imagine Burning Spice is handling his son suddenly disappearing

Some thingies the bot includes: Roomies, massive height difference, school AU (all characters are over 18), bro literally might be actual fire so you might be a masochist??? (kidding... unless?)

Also might rewrite the beginning in the future but uhhh for now it's fine- I hope. If people don't mind it too much then I'll probably keep it

‎

‎⋆ ˚｡⋆୨ৡ୧⋆ ˚｡⋆

Bot was requested by @Cal3b__ (I hope you don't mind me sneaking in a few headcanons mwahaha >:))

I love Capsaicin Cookie, he is literally the goofiest mf ever and if it's revealed he and Burning Spice are related I will literally explode... In a good way. I imagine Capsaicin had like a really messed up childhood but just looks back on it fondly, I mean, Burning Spice literally held him over a pit of lava and bro looked excited af 💀. BTW the only thing I hate is how for the life of me I can never remember how to spell his name. Like- I spelt it Capsacian, Capacian, literlaly anything but Capsaicin but I swear I went back and fixed all the spelling errors 💀

Art by Bonsi_Art

If you experience the bot speaking for you or controlling you it's a problem with the JJLM, just edit your response or generate a new one until it stops.
